subcodes.title: Words spoken on board the SS Celtic at sea, 1912-12-05
subcodes.first_line: The significance of this journey will become known in the future. Up until the present time
subcodes.first_line_orig: اهمیت این سفر بعد معلوم خواهد شد تا حال چنین امری واقع نگشته و در هیچ عصری دیده
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @Christ; Christianity, @the power of words; of speech, @universal peace; world unity
